rect.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:<rect>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

cercle.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:<circle>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

ellipse.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares an ~m:<ellipse>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

groupe.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:<group>~ variable.%0a%0aA group is a collection of SVG graphical elements (~l:circle~, ~l:ellipse~, ~l:line~, ~l:rect~, ~l:svgtext~) that all share a common parent - the ~m:group~. The main advantage of this is that you can ~l:move~ the entire group as one element without having to deal with its component parts.

ligne.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:<line>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

déplace/deplace.description: [Traduction en cours] Moves a graphical element or a ~l:group~ to a specified location in the containing ~l:svg!stage~.

sur.description: [Traduction en cours] Take action when an element or a group is clicked.
sur.examples: sur clic Button%0adébut/debut%0a  index Sound à/a le/la/les/l index de Button%0a  play Sound%0afin%0a

définis/definis.description: [Traduction en cours] Sets the text of an ~l:svgtext~ element.
définis/definis.examples: définis/definis le/la/les/l texte de ButtonLabel à/a `Help`

svg.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:<svg>~ variable. See also ~l:create~.

svgtext.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:<svgtext>~ variable. You can either attach it to a corresponding element in the HTML or create a new element; see ~l:attach~ and ~l:create~.

crée/cree.description: [Traduction en cours] Creates an element as a child of the given parent. In the case of graphical elements (~l:circle~, ~l:ellipse~, ~l:line~, ~l:rect~, ~l:svgtext~) you can also add the styles that will apply to the element.%0a%0aThere are a number of examples of using SVG graphics on the [~_**AllSpeak**_ Examples](https://allspeak.software/examples) page.
crée/cree.examples: crée/cree Stage dans Container%0acrée/cree Conveyor dans Stage%0a  style `x:0;y:140;width:` cat Width cat `;height:20;fill:#ccc`%0a

texte.description: [Traduction en cours] Returns the text of the named ~l:svgtext~ element. See also ~l:set|k!set the text~
texte.examples: mets le/la/les/l texte de Button3Text dans Text
